testcase.name: test_campaign_launch_simulated_mode
testcase.failure: backend/tests/iteration11_p1p2_test.py:127: in test_campaign_launch_simulated_mode assert cr.status_code in (200, 201), cr.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","channels"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_sim_9e37d0","channel":"sms","audience_type":"tier","audience_filter":{"tier":"silver"},"message":"hi","status":"draft"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_campaign_launch_karix_mode_with_template
testcase.failure: backend/tests/iteration11_p1p2_test.py:155: in test_campaign_launch_karix_mode_with_template assert cr.status_code in (200, 201), cr.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","channels"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_kx_d5c597","channel":"sms","audience_type":"tier","audience_filter":{"tier":"silver"},"message":"hi","status":"draft","template_id":"d7e98eecaa62449295a678f3f14140a1","send_limit":5},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in (200, 201) E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_points_ledger_ingest_and_narrative

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='pos-ewards-api.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=15)

testcase.failure:
